Our National Athlete Student Enver Erman is European Champion!

At the

European Inter-University Rowing Championship

held in Bydgoszcz, Poland between 7-10 September 2023, our student and national athlete Enver Erman became the

“European Champion”

by passing 24 country athletes in the

M1X

category with a time of 03:21.92 in the final.

We congratulate

Enver Erman

, a student at the Faculty of Economics, Administrative and Social Sciences, Department of Management Information Systems, and our Coach

Burkay Günay,

and wish them continued success.
